programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: After thousands of hopefuls applied, a field of 64 exceptional athletes has been narrowed down to sixteen elite Titans. Before their final test on Mt. programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Adam thinks the new student is a mutant from outer space.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: When the CDMS Polar Wing starts to melt during a heat spell, Adam attributes it to global warming.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4
programme.desc: It's time for Henry to return home to Greenland, bringing pompous white tiger Alistair back to CDMS. Adam and the gang pull out all the stops to try to convince Henry to stay.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4
programme.desc: In the hope of scoring a leather jacket for Jake, Adam joins The Ferals, an after school 'club', full of tough cats, and is put through a hair-raising initiation.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4
programme.desc: The school board replaces Principal Pixiefrog with a robot, and as a result, hilarity ensues.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4
programme.desc: Adam's painting of Windsor turns the gorilla into a star, and leaves Adam bitter and angry about Windsor's fancy new life.

programme.title: Pretty Crazy

programme.title: Rupert Bear

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Inheritors

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector – the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Guy is always surprising Eep with romantic gestures and Eep wants to return the favor. But when Guy proves impossible to surprise, Eep has to step up her game.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: The Crood and Betterman parents have been struggling to get along – they’re so different! The two couple realize they need some time apart and decide to get away from the farm and each other. Too bad both couples choose to take a break on the same, small beach.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: While the parents are away, the kids are in charge of the tree house, but when the punch monkeys invade the house, the kids find themselves out of their element.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Finally promoted to CEO, Boss Baby sets his sights on achieving 100% Baby Love, while dealing with the annoying Puppies and Preeks who rented Baby Corp office space while Boss was gone. Tim and Danny become local heroes after saving a baby's life.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby encounters a new threat to Baby Love: an adorable Baby TV show starring Pyg the Pygmy Goat, Tam the Tamandua, and their host Maria-Maria. Boss is told not to go to Corporate War by Board Baby Emiliano, so Boss tries to provoke his enemies to make the first move.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss promises Tim he'll help make their parents' anniversary present, but after Puppy Co. and Baby Corp's fight over a conference room escalates, he sends Hendershot is his stead. Hendershot, armed with a file on all of Tim's wants and needs, tries to keep Tim happy.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.desc: As a new term begins, Maricela and her horse, Mystery, arrive at the academy to join Lucky, Pru and Abigail for the school year.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Casper, the Match Maker When Frankengymteacher gets extra crabby, the kids realize he's secretly in love with their history teacher, Hedy. Jimmy Bradley: Creature Catcher On “take your kid to work day,” Jimmy's dad invites him to tag along as a junior ghost catcher.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert asks Ping Pong to do some magic to make their band instruments play better but the spell goes wrong. The colourful musical notes fly away, leaving them with instruments that make no sound.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When it starts raining sausages in Nutwood Rupert and friends fly up to the Cloud Shepherd's home to find out what has happened to the weather machine.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. Kelp tells his family he’s a unicorn. / Kelp returns to Unicorn Land where he meets Pixie and Juniper, who show him around and introduce him to unicorn spark and magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: 47 Ronin

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.title: The Man With the Iron Fists

programme.title: Waterworld

programme.title: Cape Fear

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq 1
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey into the heart of Iraq on his way to Baghdad, and arrives in Kirkuk and the exact spot where the British discovered oil in 1927, when they also ruled the country. The next day, Michael heads towards Tikrit, Saddam Hussein's hometown. Having been stopped at several military checkpoints along the way, but is surprised when he receives a warm welcome from the local commander and coins it 'Checkpoint Cheerful'.

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful and sentient A.I. from taking over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist who must be exterminated…

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah creates a flavourful party menu featuring zupa ogórkowa, a Polish dill pickle chowder, and Kansas City-style barbecue salmon with biscuits. She smokes the salmon, then prepares a pickle soup.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen for a cooking challenge. Both Rachael and Sara create mystery meals using ingredients from Rachael's Tuscan pantry.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Season 13 celebrates the “United Tastes of America,” bringing together chefs from four regions of the country: the Northeast, the Midwest, the West and the South.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The auditions continue as chefs from the Midwest battle it out for a coveted spot in the top 20. Each contestant has 45 minutes to prepare a signature dish that will impress the judges.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Six charismatic rookie actors gather under one roof for a groundbreaking residency audition. Age, experience and style all differ, but they share one goal: to become the male lead of a romantic drama.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: Murder at the Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.desc: A powerful story of a mother and daughter who are held captive in their own home, and whose love and wits help them survive the impossible. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Casting 1147km

programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: On an early spring ride around the base of this extensive mountain range, we meet an artisan making traditional snowshoes, a family making salmon trout sushi, and villagers picking medicinal herbs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Design Hunting in Shiga. This central prefecture is home to Lake Biwa and rich water resources led to a unique regional culture. Our design hunt explores modern updates on tradition.

programme.title: U&I
programme.desc: This show for kids promotes a greater understanding for people with difficulties and helps develop empathy. With the help of two fairies, the main character thinks about what can be done to help.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: The proactive science education program which encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Mount Fuji Truth
programme.desc: Mount Fuji is an icon of Japan. We explore how it attained its height and cone shape, where its water goes, and the story behind the Fujiko faith.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Good Or Evil Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Bosai: Science that can save your
programme.desc: Massive logistics facilities underpin online retail, but their robust warehouse structures, state-of-the-art seismic isolation systems and other features make them suitable as evacuation sites too.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Fukasawa Naoto (Product designer) visits Shimane. Red "Sekishu" roof tiles are perfectly suited to cold, snowy regions. Fukasawa considers design that embodies the community it comes from.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Chushingura is one of the most popular plays. It is based on a sensational historical incident when 47 masterless samurai avenged the death of their lord. Ainosuke explores it in a two-part series.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: The eruption of Mt. Fuji could spew 490 million cubic meters of ash over a wide area, including Tokyo. CG and dramatization, based on the latest scientific research, highlight the potential risks.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Barakan Discovers Tosa
programme.desc: In 1843, after surviving a shipwreck, 16-year-old John Manjiro found himself in the US. He later played a key role in opening Japan's doors to the world. Peter Barakan visits Manjiro's hometown, Tosa.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Café Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the café cat-friendly

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Race Day and the pups are about to race each other across the town to see who is the fastest. // Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs Ryder and the pups to help him. The race is on to get the cake baked and to the competition on time!

programme.title: Deer Squad
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it!

programme.desc: Tim and Kai go crater surfing and attempt a cool new trick. // Tim and Kai attempt to rebuild Dad's childhood spaceship. // Tim tries to rid the house of a troublesome space bug.

programme.desc: Mr. Potato has come to visit the playgroup and he's brought along his superhero friend, Super Potato!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit saves the day when Grandpa Pig's boat sinks and drives everyone around on his Hovercraft!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star in school for drawing a wonderful picture of her house!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Today is George’s birthday and Mummy and Daddy Pig have a special day planned. George gets a new Brontosaurus toy and the family go to the museum to see lots of different dinosaurs.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig are taking Peppa and George to play in the playground. On the way it gets a bit foggy, and soon it is so foggy they can’t see. They decide to go home. But which way is home?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the swimming pool. Rebecca Rabbit is there too. She and Peppa are very proud of their swimming skills. Everyone is surprised to discover that Daddy Pig is very good at swimming and diving. Very good indeed.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa’s playgroup is holding a jumble sale to raise money for a new roof and Madame Gazelle asks everyone to bring something to sell. Peppa and her friends bring in an old toy but they soon realise that favourite toys can be hard to let go of.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.desc: Get ready to crash and bash, 'cause today is the SUPER SMASH RACE! But when Crusher cheats and sends Zeg and Blaze far away, it's up to Blaze to help Zeg get back to the race, so he can slam and wham his way to a SMASH-tacular finish!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Friends S8 8
programme.desc: Rachel nervously tells her father, Dr. Leonard Green that she is pregnant.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 3
programme.desc: The entire gang competes in a cutthroat scavenger hunt.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 4
programme.desc: After Amy ruins one of Sheldon's favorite movies, Raiders of the Lost Ark, he gets defensive, seeking revenge. Meanwhile, Leonard discovers a way to get Penny to do anything

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 5
programme.desc: Sheldon must decide how much "Amy time" is too much after she takes a job at his university. Meanwhile, Howard finds himself sleeping on Raj's couch after a fight with Bernadette

programme.title: War Dogs
programme.desc: The Wolf of Wall Street's Jonah Hill and Whiplash's Miles Teller star in this dramedy based on a true story that follows two twenty-something Miami stoners who exploit a little-known government initiative during the Iraq War that allows small businesses to bid on U.S. Military contracts. Starting small, they begin raking in big money and are soon living the high life. But the pair gets in over their heads when they land a $300 million deal to arm the Afghan Military -- a deal that puts them in business with some very shady people, not the least of which turns out to be the U.S. Government. Comedy powerhouse Todd Phillips (The Hangover films) writes, directs and produces (with Bradley Cooper) this incredible true story based on a controversial Rolling Stone article.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 6
programme.desc: Sheldon's latest scientific breakthrough makes him feel like a fraud. Meanwhile, Howard's romantic gesture to Bernadette causes Penny to step up her game with Leonard.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 7
programme.desc: Sheldon feels slighted when Professor Proton (BOB NEWHART) seeks advice from Leonard instead of him, and he seeks revenge by befriending a rival science TV host, BILL NYE.

programme.title: Cry Macho
programme.desc: A former rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder goes on a redemptive journey to Mexico to retrieve his ex-boss' son in this moving drama.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected Baltimore-based twenty and thirtysomethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep murky waters of married life trying to read the signs of the opposite sex - and hoping to be the exceptions to the no-exceptions rule. Gigi just wants a man who says he'll call - and does - while Alex advises her to stop sitting by the phone. Beth wonders if she should call it off after years of committed singlehood with her boyfriend Neil but he doesn't think there's a single thing wrong with their unmarried life. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband Ben who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward no-sparks standby Conor who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary who's found an entire network of loving supportive men just needs to find one who's straight.

programme.title: Jersey Boys
programme.desc: From Oscar?winning director Clint Eastwood (Million Dollar Baby, Unforgiven) comes the big-screen adaptation of the Tony Award-winning musical. JERSEY BOYS tells the story of four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the legendary 1960s rock group The Four Seasons. John Lloyd Young reprises his Tony-winning role of legendary lead singer Frankie Valli, alongside Erich Bergen as the group's co-writer Bob Gaudio. The story of their trials and triumphsare accompanied by the songs that influenced a generation, including "Sherry," Big Girls Don't Cry," Walk Like a Man," and many more --classic hits that are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the musical that's been running on Broadway for more than eight years.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: Behind every great love is a great story. In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple. Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love. Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: ER S2 15
programme.desc: When a sprinkler on the maternity floor malfunctions, eight women giving birth are transferred to the ER. Ross visits his estranged father. Benton tries to prove himself.

programme.title: ER S2 16
programme.desc: Burn victims flood the ER; Lewis learns her fate regarding plans to adopt her niece; Ross considers meeting his estranged father.

programme.title: Friends S8 9
programme.desc: In this Thanksgiving episode, special guest star BRAD PITT.

programme.title: Friends S8 10
programme.desc: Chandler becomes upset when Monica spends a fortune on a luxurious pair of black boots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 8
programme.desc: Filling in as a karate instructor, Michael disrupts the Zen of his student with skills that literally lift him off the ground, and at a toy store, Michael's frog necklace is so fashionably realistic that it has one little girl begging for a new pet. Then at a military outfitting store, Michael and an employee put together a clothing display that puts the "man" in mannequin.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 9
programme.desc: Michael works at a camping store where his life-saving s'mores and pop-up coolers stun would-be glampers, and later at a health food store, a child safety pill bottle with built-in invisibility proves too complicated for adults. Then, at variety store, a customer goes off the rails when Michael adjusts the size of a model train.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 10
programme.desc: Michael befuddles a hardware store patron with a collapsible spray paint can, and cuts a costume shop employee down to size when he shrinks into a leprechaun outfit. Later, a museum employee makes the discovery of a lifetime when a preserved egg hatches a baby dinosaur.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 11
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael tries to pull a fast one on burger joint patrons with his inflatable hot dogs and his unusual technique for bagging buns. Then he creeps out a flea market vendor when he brings an acrylic encased arachnid back to life, and later his co-worker doesn't give a hoot about her job at the camping store when an owl takes over their display.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 12
programme.desc: Michael hits the jackpot at a convenience store and amazes a mother when he demonstrates her child's genius abilities at a toy store. Later, MIchael astonishes his Japanese restaurant co-worker with a set-up that really takes the cake.

programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: In a story that gripped the nation, three Cleveland women are rescued ten years after vanishing from the city's streets. Now, authorities must confront the man at the heart of this notorious crime.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a teenage girl vanishes and her car is found abandoned, investigators uncover a calculated plot driven by a boyfriend’s obsessive jealousy.

programme.title: Murder At the Motel
programme.desc: July 1, 2021, Falls Township, Pennsylvania. Falls Township Police are dispatched to the New Falls Motel after receiving a call about an unresponsive female.

programme.title: Murder At the Motel
programme.desc: May 13, 2020, Reno, Nevada. Officers from the Reno Police Department are dispatched to the La Quinta Inn after several motel guests report hearing gunshots in the middle of the night.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S2)
programme.desc: Thai actor witnessed the exorcism of a Phi Pop (a cannibalistic female spirit) in his village when he was a child, while in Philippines, an uncle brings supernatural beings into his relative's house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S2)
programme.desc: Palm and Neung were both taken aback by their sister, Song's sudden change of personalities overnight, but when asked about her actions, Song had no recollection of them.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Since early childhood, living in a cluttered home is all that Destiny has ever known. In 2004 tragedy struck the family when a car accident took the lives of Destiny's sister and nephew.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Residents of Robeson, Pennsylvania were stunned when Ashley Kline went missing on New Year's Eve. The 12-day search turned up several suspects until investigators uncovered suspicious text messages.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Nia Wilson and her two sisters decided to take public transportation back home. But just minutes after texting their father, the sisters were brutally targeted at a train station.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Bruce is very thoughtful and always keeps things with the idea that he'll give them to someone he knows because they could use that item.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Good intentions have led Bruce to collect a massive amount of tools and clutter over the years.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a barrage of gunfire leaves three men dead in a residential neighbourhood, Gwinnett detectives use every available resource to identify the killer.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S4)
programme.desc: A man falls asleep while driving and kills a construction worker on the road. Was he a reckless driver or an innocent man with an undiagnosed medical condition?

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: Desperate to stop the senseless shootings in her community, Detective Kenyata 'KeeKee' Taylor must find out why the latest teen victim was wearing a ski mask when he was killed.

programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: Antique dealer Aurore Morisse crosses the Tour de Crest, Mirmande, the Via Rhona and the Via Ardeche. With Adrien, they blow glass in Ruoms and discover the treasures of the region.

programme.title: Le Magazine De LA Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: An engaged content creator, Oceane specializes in textured hair and is the creator of the Curl Talk Show program. Born to a Cameroonian mother and a French father, she uses her curls as a pretext to create a space for education, self-confidence and identity affirmation.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: She's a legend of French handball! World champion, Olympic champion, European champion, and also voted best handball player in the world in 2009: Allison Pineau is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: How can French gastronomy be reinvented? Richard Orlinski meets talents who break the codes without renouncing their roots. Alice Tuyet, a self-taught Parisian chef, fuses her Franco-Vietnamese heritage and offers innovative vegan cuisine. In her restaurant in the Saint-Honore district, she revisits classics by integrating sauces rich in flavor and surprising textures. The gourmet journey continues in Vietnam with former culinary columnist Benoît Chaigneau, now a restaurateur and fish sauce producer. Between colorful markets and production workshops, Benoît combines local know-how and French gastronomic standards to create an exceptional smoked sauce.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ?
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer
programme.desc: On the menu: egg and fine herb nests, spring roll bundles, ricotta, green bean and asparagus sandwich, lemon tarts.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: TaratatA 100% Live
programme.desc: For almost 90 minutes, watch the greatest names on the French and international music scene appear one after the other. Unexpected duets and trios, first-time covers, new talents... ''Taratata 100% live'' has all the ingredients that have made it a success, with even more live performances.

programme.title: Ardennes, Toute ame a Ses Petits Secrets
programme.desc: Enigmatic psychiatrist Olivier Rimbaud lives in an isolated manor in Champagne-Ardenne. In addition to taking care of his patients, he does profiling to help the police with the most complex cases. As he sets out on the trail of a serial killer, his own secrets catch up with him.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: FestA Major
programme.desc: In a village in the Pyrenees-Orientales, a ritual that has lasted for a hundred years takes place every year at the end of summer: a large popular celebration spread over five days. The camera films this ode to joy, lightness and sharing like a timeless tableau.

programme.title: LA Copie De Coralie
programme.desc: Manager of a reprographics shop, Mr. Conforme is haunted by the memory of a woman. Witnessing the distress of the employer, Virginie, the assistant, posts a search notice on the walls of the city.

programme.title: Ativio - Les Morceaux De Bois
programme.desc: Guenole, aged 12, lives in an isolated Togolese village. Gifted in music, he dreams of playing the piano but doesn't own one.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).
